title: Diorite
description: A vanilla like modpack made to just chill with people you like. Designed with builders in mind.
body: Diorite is a modpack built on personal favorites from BlanketCon '25. Designed for the titular server, it puts together mods that add block varieties, audio broadcasts, comfort foods, and alcohol! Whether your mining, crafting, alone or with friends, building projects, making farms, exploring dungeons. Whatever, wherever, the music always brings it all together! Bar is open for drinks! **Join at diorite.tw25.net**
